summary: Backend testing for Edentulous Site numeric fields (occlusocervical_height, mesiodistal_space) completed successfully. All 8 tests passed. Verified: (1) POST /api/procedures accepts new fields, (2) GET /api/procedures/{id} returns stored values, (3) PDF generation includes 'Edentulous Site' heading with 'Occlusocervical Height: X mm' and 'Mesiodistal Space: X mm', (4) PDF generation doesn't crash when checklist is null (NoneType bug fix verified), (5) Backward compatibility for procedures without new fields.
critical_code_review_comments: ProcedureCreate schema correctly includes occlusocervical_height and mesiodistal_space as Optional[str] with max_length=10
ProcedureUpdate schema correctly includes the same fields for updates
PDF generator at lines 1994-2011 correctly outputs 'Edentulous Site' heading with 'Occlusocervical Height: X mm' and 'Mesiodistal Space: X mm'
NoneType bug fix verified at lines 2162, 2213, 2249 using (procedure.get('checklist') or {}).get() pattern
Backward compatibility maintained - old edentulous_sites multi-select format still works
seed_data_creation: None - test procedures created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edentulous Site numeric fields fully tested. Key verifications: (1) Fields stored as strings (e.g., '12.5', '8.0'), (2) PDF shows 'Edentulous Site' heading with 'Occlusocervical Height: 15.0 mm' and 'Mesiodistal Space: 10.5 mm', (3) Empty fields work correctly, (4) Decimal values work correctly, (5) NoneType bug fix for checklist verified.
verified_features: Backend: POST /api/procedures accepts occlusocervical_height and mesiodistal_space fields - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/procedures/{id} returns stored occlusocervical_height and mesiodistal_space values - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/procedures/{id}/case-report generates PDF with 'Edentulous Site' heading - VERIFIED
Backend: PDF contains 'Occlusocervical Height: X mm' in clinical examination section - VERIFIED
Backend: PDF contains 'Mesiodistal Space: X mm' in clinical examination section - VERIFIED
Backend: PDF generation does not crash when checklist is null (NoneType bug fix) - VERIFIED
Backend: Procedure creation with all required fields succeeds using Implant In-Charge role - VERIFIED
Backend: Existing procedures without new fields still generate PDFs correctly (backward compatibility) - VERIFIED
Backend: Empty edentulous fields accepted (fields are optional) - VERIFIED
Backend: Decimal values for edentulous fields work correctly - VERIFIED
